name: aios-workspace
description: Agent-native operating system for an individual contributor: governed workspace scaffold, multi-agent harnesses with rubric-gated self-correction, AIOS Team Brain sync client, and a local GUI.

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/ensure-loop-built.mjs && node scripts/gui-runtime-preflight.mjs --warn-only && node scripts/postinstall-banner.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint scripts validation gui/server gui/client/src test
scripts.lint:fix: eslint scripts validation gui/server gui/client/src test --fix
scripts.test: npm run build:loop && node scripts/check-domain-isolation.mjs && node scripts/check-file-size.mjs && node scripts/inbox-redaction-lint.mjs && node --test scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace gui/client && c8 --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --report-dir=coverage --exclude='gui/client/**' --exclude='coverage/**' npm test && node scripts/merge-coverage.mjs
scripts.app:dev: npm run gui:preflight && npm run gui:build && dotenvx run -- tauri dev
scripts.app:build: npm run gui:preflight && npm run gui:build && tauri build
